notes: Solid Tetris implementation with DAS, ghost piece, wall kicks, and proper scoring; minor issue with lock timer logic using interval instead of fixed 0.5s threshold, and the left panel area is referenced but unused.
Excellent implementation with DAS, ghost piece, wall kicks, and hard/soft drops; rotation is basic bounding-box rather than SRS, but fully functional.
A solid but not flawless Tetris build with working core loop and controls, held back by simplistic rotation/no proper bag system, minor UX oddities, and some nonstandard behavior.
